name_en: M46961 Red - Creative Director Pharrell Williams reinterprets the Speedy Bandoulière 50 Monogram Leather bag with eye-catching, luxurious, and soft natural calfskin. He uses exquisite screen printing to embellish the Speedy with the Monogram pattern, recreating the twill texture of the Monogram canvas on the bag, creating a near-hand-painted blurred effect. 50 x 32 x 29 cm (Length x Height x Width)
name_cn:
M46961 Red - Creative Director Pharrell Williams reinterprets the Speedy Bandoulière 50 Monogram Leather bag with eye-catching, luxurious, and soft natural calfskin. He uses exquisite screen printing to embellish the Speedy with the Monogram pattern, recreating the twill texture of the Monogram canvas on the bag, creating a near-hand-painted blurred effect. 50 x 32 x 29 cm (Length x Height x Width)
【Warm Tip: This item is too large to be packaged】
